stemHtml: ATC: "G-ACBR TRANSMIT FOR IDENTIFICATION AND REPORT HEADING". What should the pilot do?

options.a: Transmit: "G-ACBR, TRANSMITTING FOR IDENTIFICATION PURPOSES, HEADING [xxx]".
options.b: Reselect Mode S and transmit heading.
options.c: Press IDENT and transmit call sign plus heading.
options.d: Set transponder to STBY and transmit heading.
